text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYT: U.S. President Trump interjected during a meeting on Iranian ceasefire negotiations to list the number of bridges and power plants he was prepared to strike, telling aides that the Iranian government would be responsible if any of the U.S. strikes killed Iranians gathered around the structures. Prior to the announcement of the last minute ceasefire agreement, talks had privately been progressing with Supreme Leader of Iran Khamenei appearing to approve of negotiations moving forward on Monday. But on Tuesday morning the White House had grown impatient, leading to Trump posting his threat against Iran. This lead Iranian leaders, furious over Trump threatening to strike critical infrastructure, to pass a message along through Pakistan that communication with the U.S. would cease, believing that Iranian control over the Strait of Hormuz gave them the upper hand. It was China that was able to break the impass in negotiations by telling Iran to think of the economic impact on their allies, such as China, of keeping the Strait closed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 纽约时报：美国总统特朗普在伊朗停火谈判会议中插话，列举了他准备打击的桥梁和发电厂数量，并告知助手，若美军袭击导致聚集在这些建筑周围的伊朗人死亡，伊朗政府将承担责任。在最后一刻停火协议宣布前，谈判曾私下取得进展，伊朗最高领袖哈梅内伊似乎于周一批准了推进谈判。但周二上午白宫失去耐心，导致特朗普发布了对伊朗的威胁。此举激怒了伊朗领导人，他们认为特朗普威胁打击关键基础设施的行为不可接受，遂通过巴基斯坦传递信息，表示将中止与美国的沟通，并相信伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的控制权使其占据上风。最终是中国打破了谈判僵局，告知伊朗应考虑关闭海峡对其盟友（如中国）的经济影响。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 White House ballroom plan criticized over foreign steel Plans by Donald Trump to build a new ballroom at the White House are facing backlash (again) after reports that part of the steel would come from abroad. The project—estimated at about $400 million and backed by private donations—reportedly includes materials supplied by ArcelorMittal and produced in Europe. The issue has drawn attention because it appears to clash with Trump’s “America First” agenda, which emphasized tariffs on imported steel to protect U.S. industry. Critics say the use of foreign steel in a flagship presidential project undercuts that policy message, turning the ballroom into a broader symbol of inconsistency in trade priorities. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 白宫宴会厅计划因使用外国钢材遭批评 特朗普在白宫建造新宴会厅的计划（再次）引发反弹，因有报道称部分钢材将来自国外。该项目估计耗资约4亿美元，由私人捐款支持，据报道使用了安赛乐米塔尔公司在欧洲生产的材料。此事引发关注是因为它似乎与特朗普“美国优先”的议程相冲突，该议程强调对进口钢材加征关税以保护美国工业。批评者指出，在总统的标志性项目中使用外国钢材削弱了这一政策信息，使宴会厅成为贸易优先事项不一致的更广泛象征。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NATO Secretary General Rutte says that U.S. President Trump is clearly upset by the lack of NATO support during the conflict with Iran, but that he explained to Trump the ways that NATO members gave support. "Well, let me be absolutely clear. He is clearly disappointed with many NATO allies, and I can see his point. But at the same time, I was also able to point to the fact that the large majority of European nations has been helpful with basing, with logistics, with overflights, with making sure that they live up to the commitments. And there is also widespread support for the fact that degrading the nuclear and the ballistic missile capacity from Iran was really crucial and that only the U.S. was able to do that at this point." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 北约秘书长吕特表示，美国总统特朗普显然对北约在伊朗冲突期间缺乏支持感到不满，但他向特朗普解释了北约成员国提供支持的方式。“我明确说明：他对许多北约盟友显然感到失望，我理解他的观点。但与此同时，我也能指出绝大多数欧洲国家在基地使用、后勤、飞越权方面提供了帮助，确保他们履行承诺。并且广泛支持削弱伊朗核与弹道导弹能力至关重要，而目前只有美国能做到这一点。”@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 AP: 50 newly created Polymarket wallets placed large “Yes” bets on a ceasefire on April 7, despite escalating rhetoric from U.S. President Trump earlier in the day suggesting no imminent agreement. Some accounts made significant profits within hours. One wallet reportedly turned a $72,000 position into around $200,000, while others recorded gains exceeding $100,000. The episode has renewed calls in Washington to regulate prediction markets more tightly, amid concerns they could be exploited by insiders with advance knowledge of geopolitical or military developments. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美联社：尽管美国总统特朗普当天早些时候升级言论暗示无即刻协议，50个新创建的Polymarket钱包仍在4月7日对停火押下大额“是”注。部分账户在数小时内获得巨额利润。据报道，一个钱包将7.2万美元头寸变为约20万美元，其他账户收益超过10万美元。此事在华盛顿再度引发更严格监管预测市场的呼声，因担忧其可能被掌握地缘政治或军事进展内幕者利用。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The White House is considering a plan to punish certain NATO allies that U.S. President Trump believes did not support the United States and Israel during the Iran war. The proposal includes potentially relocating U.S. troops away from countries deemed unhelpful, such as Spain, Germany, Italy, and France, and redeploying them to more supportive nations, particularly in Eastern Europe. The plan remains in early stages but has gained traction among senior officials. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：白宫正考虑一项计划，惩罚美国总统特朗普认为在伊朗战争期间未支持美国和以色列的某些北约盟友。该提案包括可能将美军从被视为不合作的国家（如西班牙、德国、意大利和法国）撤离，并重新部署到更支持的国家，尤其是东欧地区。该计划仍处于早期阶段，但已获得高级官员的关注。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 Kan: Israeli officials assess that Iran is considering launching attacks against Israel in response to continued Israeli strikes in Lebanon after the Israeli leadership insisted to the U.S. that Lebanon not be included in the ceasefire agreement. Despite the current truce, Israeli officials believe the ceasefire could become permanent and lead to a broader agreement with Iran, though concerns remain over Tehran’s ballistic missile programme and enriched uranium stockpiles. Sources in Israel expressed frustration over the situation, suggesting the current arrangement may only delay future conflict, while acknowledging the decisive role of the United States in shaping outcomes. @wfwitness

text_zh: 实物原油今日涨至157美元，昨日为150美元。期货市场的操纵行为极其疯狂。

text: DD Geopolitics pinned a photo
text_zh: DD地缘政治置顶了一张照片

text: 🇺🇸 According to a new poll, more than half of Americans want Congress to impeach Trump right now, one in seven Republicans supports this — Newsweek
text_zh: 🇺🇸 新民意调查显示，超半数美国人希望国会立即弹劾特朗普，七分之一的共和党人支持此动议——新闻周刊

text: No oil tankers have passed through the Strait of Hormuz since yesterday's ceasefire, and the four ships that have passed are all dry cargo carriers, data from shipping intelligence firm Kpler shows — NYT
text_zh: 航运情报公司Kpler数据显示，自昨日停火以来，未有油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡，已通过的四艘船只均为干散货船——纽约时报

text: ⚡️ 🇰🇷 🇺🇸 South Korea and the United States announce the start of their joint “Freedom Flag” air drills this week, running from April 10-24 from Gwangju air base. South Korea will deploy F-15K, KF-16, F-35A, KA-1 light attack aircraft, and KC-330 transport planes, while the U.S. will use F-16s, F/A-18s, RQ-4 Global Hawk, and MQ-9 Reaper drones. The exercises will focus on air defense, interdiction, and close air support. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇰🇷 🇺🇸 韩国与美国宣布本周启动联合“自由旗帜”空中演习，时间为4月10日至24日，以光州空军基地为据点。韩国将部署F-15K、KF-16、F-35A、KA-1轻型攻击机和KC-330运输机，美国将使用F-16、F/A-18、RQ-4全球鹰及MQ-9死神无人机。演习将聚焦防空、拦截和近距空中支援。@wfwitness

text: ❗️ Hezbullah confirms they are part of the ceasefire and stress that the limited rocket fire tonight is the start of a response ladder until Israel and the U.S comply Hezbullah: In defense of Lebanon and its people, in response to the enemy's violation of the ceasefire agreement, and after the resistance adhered to the ceasefire while the enemy did not, the Islamic Resistance fighters targeted the "Manara" settlement at 02:30 on Thursday, 09/04/2026, with a rocket barrage. This response will continue until the "israeli"-American aggression against our country and our people ceases. "
text_zh: ❗️ 真主党确认参与停火，并强调今晚有限的火箭弹袭击是回应阶梯的开始，直至以色列和美国遵守。真主党：为保卫黎巴嫩及其人民，回应敌人违反停火协议，且在抵抗力量遵守停火而敌人未遵守之后，伊斯兰抵抗战士于2026年4月9日星期四02:30，以火箭弹齐射瞄准了“马纳拉”定居点。这一回应将持续到“以色列”-美国对我国和我国人民的侵略停止为止。

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 WaPo: Hungary privately offered assistance to Iran following a major Israeli operation targeting Hezbollah, raising concerns among Western officials about Budapest’s geopolitical positioning. Hungarian Foreign Minister Szijjártó told Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi that Hungary’s intelligence services would share information related to the incident, despite Hungary publicly maintaining a pro-Israel stance. The report has intensified scrutiny of Hungary’s role within NATO and the EU, particularly as it navigates relationships with competing global powers during a period of heightened Middle East tensions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 《华盛顿邮报》：以色列针对真主党的大规模行动后，匈牙利私下向伊朗提供援助，引发西方官员对布达佩斯地缘政治立场的担忧。匈牙利外长西雅尔多告诉伊朗外长阿拉格希，匈牙利情报机构将分享与事件相关的信息，尽管匈牙利公开保持亲以色列立场。该报告加剧了对匈牙利在北约和欧盟中角色的审视，尤其是在中东紧张局势加剧期间，其与全球竞争大国关系的处理上。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Strait of Hormuz sees almost no tanker movement since the ceasefire, according to NYT. Only four vessels crossed the strait — all dry cargo ships.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 《纽约时报》报道，自停火以来，霍尔木兹海峡几乎无油轮活动。仅四艘船只穿越海峡——均为干货船。

text: Trump: NATO WASN’T THERE WHEN WE NEEDED THEM, AND THEY WON’T BE THERE IF WE NEED THEM AGAIN. REMEMBER GREENLAND, THAT BIG, POORLY RUN, PIECE OF ICE!!!
text_zh: 特朗普：北约在我们需要时不在，若我们再次需要他们也不会在。记住格陵兰，那块管理不善的大冰块！！！

text: 🇱🇧 Tomorrow, we’re hosting a special Lebanon-focused show, and we’re honored to be joined by our friend Ali Rida Sbeity — a Lebanese journalist and war correspondent for RT, as well as the cameraman for our friend Steve Sweeney. You may remember Ali and Steve from when they were targeted in a Zionist airstrike while reporting in southern Lebanon. ➡️ Make sure to
text_zh: 🇱🇧 明天，我们将主持一期聚焦黎巴嫩的特别节目，并荣幸邀请到我们的朋友阿里·里达·斯贝提——一位黎巴嫩记者、RT的战地记者，也是我们朋友史蒂夫·斯威尼的摄像师。你可能记得阿里和史蒂夫在黎巴嫩南部报道时曾成为锡安主义空袭目标。➡️ 请务必

text: 🇮🇷 IRGC Navy announced alternative routes for transit in the Strait of Hormuz IRGC Navy: — Considering the wartime situation in the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz from 1404/12/09 to 1405/01/19 and the possibility of various types of anti-ship mines in the main traffic zone of the Strait of Hormuz (according to the map), it is announced to all ships intending to transit the Strait of Hormuz that, to observe maritime safety principles and avoid possible contact with naval mines, they must coordinate with the IRGC Navy in the Strait of Hormuz and, until further notice, use the following alternative routes for transit in the Strait of Hormuz as per the attached map: — Entry route: From the Sea of Oman northwards, to Larak Island, then continuing towards the Persian Gulf. (According to the map) — Exit route: From the Persian Gulf, passing south of Larak Island, and continuing towards the Sea of Oman. (According to the map)
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军宣布霍尔木兹海峡的替代过境路线。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军：——鉴于1404年12月9日至1405年1月19日期间波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡的战时状况，以及霍尔木兹海峡主要交通区域可能出现各类反舰水雷（根据地图），特此通知所有计划过境霍尔木兹海峡的船只，为遵守海上安全原则并避免可能接触水雷，必须与霍尔木兹海峡的伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军协调，并在另行通知前，使用以下附图中霍尔木兹海峡的替代过境路线：——进入路线：从阿曼海向北，至拉腊克岛，然后继续向波斯湾航行。（根据地图）——离开路线：从波斯湾出发，经拉腊克岛以南，继续向阿曼海航行。（根据地图）

text: The only demographic still pro-Israel in the US is a Republican over 50.
text_zh: 在美国唯一仍支持以色列的人群是50岁以上的共和党人。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 JD Vance: "Israel is going to stand down"... They didn't. Iran: The ceasefire wasn't abided by... We're closing Hormuz — attacks will continue. "So, basically... there is no peace deal" — Alex Jones. "Trump agreed to something he didn't even read." " All to make the oil drop ."
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 JD·万斯称：“以色列将退让”……但他们没有。伊朗：未遵守停火协议……我们将关闭霍尔木兹海峡——攻击将继续。“所以，基本上……没有和平协议”——亚历克斯·琼斯。“特朗普同意了连他自己都没读的东西。”“全是为了让油价下跌。”

text: 🔄 Forwarded from DD Geopolitics: 🇮🇷 “Hezbollah is an important pillar of the Axis of Resistance. We do not forget how our mujahid brothers in Hezbollah carried out precise strikes in the northern occupied territories and at strategic locations in Haifa. Hezbollah is the very life of Iran and will not be left alone.” - Gholamhossein Mohseni-Ejei, Head of the Judiciary of the Islamic Republic of Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🔄 转发自DD地缘政治：🇮🇷 “真主党是抵抗轴心的重要支柱。我们不会忘记，我们的圣战者兄弟真主党如何在北部被占领土和海法战略要地实施精确打击。真主党是伊朗的生命线，绝不会被孤立。”——伊朗伊斯兰共和国司法总监戈拉姆侯赛因·穆赫辛尼·埃杰伊。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇬🇱 U.S. President Trump: NATO WASN'T THERE WHEN WE NEEDED THEM, AND THEY WON'T BE THERE IF WE NEED THEM AGAIN. REMEMBER GREENLAND, THAT BIG, POORLY RUN, PIECE OF ICE!!! President DJT @wfwitness

text: Rare footage from the Reuters archives shows the aftermath of the Israeli air force bombing of the Bahr al-Baqar primary school in Egypt, which resulted in the martyrdom of 46 children, April 8, 1970. Israeli Defense Minister Moshe Dayan commented on the massacre: "Perhaps the Egyptians put the schoolchildren in a military base."
text_zh: 路透社档案中的罕见镜头显示了以色列空军轰炸埃及巴赫尔巴卡尔小学后的场景，导致46名儿童殉难，1970年4月8日。以色列国防部长摩西·达扬对此屠杀评论道：“也许埃及人把小学生放在了军事基地里。”

text: 🇺🇸 Guess the meeting with Mark Rutte didn't go so well... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 看来与马克·吕特的会面不太顺利…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇦🇪 🇮🇱 Morteza Hossein, reporter at Drop Site: It seems that the United Arab Emirates is involved in a plan led by Israel to sabotage Trump's ceasefire and is also directly entering the war." 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇦🇪 Missile and drone attacks struck the UAE and Kuwait just hours after oil facilities on Iran's Lavan Island were targeted hours after the ceasefire — PressTV Footage: Fujairah UAE in response to Lavan earlier today.
text_zh: ↩️ 回应ResistanceTrench镜像报道："🇦🇺 🇮🇱 现场记者莫塔扎·侯赛因：阿联酋似乎参与了以色列主导的一项破坏特朗普停火协议的计划，并已直接介入战争。" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇦🇺 停火协议达成数小时后，伊朗拉万岛石油设施遇袭，随即阿联酋和科威特遭导弹与无人机袭击——PressTV影像：今日早些时候富查伊拉阿联酋对拉万事件的回应。

text: On this day in 1970, Israel bombed Bahr el-Baqar primary school in the Egyptian village of Bahr el-Baqar killing 46 children and injuring more than 50. The whole school was levelled by US made F-4 jets.
text_zh: 1970年的今天，以色列轰炸埃及巴赫尔巴卡尔村小学，造成46名儿童死亡、50余人受伤。整所学校被美制F-4战机夷为平地。

text: Maya Muhammad Balaghi and her daughter Lina Hassan Afif Issa, from the southern town of Ramiya killed today in the attack on the mosque in Sidon

text: Trump wants taxpayers to pay 15 million for his 250 million dollar arc; 13 million in matching grants. All this while his 2026 budget makes much needed cuts to many programs for Americans.
text_zh: 特朗普想让纳税人为他2.5亿美元的拱门支付1500万美元；另有1300万美元的配套拨款。而与此同时，他2026年的预算案却大幅削减了许多美国人急需的项目。
